list.name: instance
list.query: SELECT LEFT(instance_hash, 12) || ' (' || profile || ')' AS __text, instance_hash AS __value FROM installations ORDER BY last_seen DESC;

targets.rawSql: SELECT time_bucket('1 hour', time) AS time, AVG((data->>'cop_instant')::real) AS "COP", LEFT(instance_hash, 8) AS "metric" FROM metrics WHERE data->>'cop_instant' IS NOT NULL AND (data->>'cop_instant')::real > 0 AND ('${instance:raw}' = '$__all' OR instance_hash IN (${instance:sqlstring})) AND $__timeFilter(time) GROUP BY 1, instance_hash ORDER BY 1;

SELECT time_bucket('1 hour', time) AS time, AVG((data->>'outdoor_temp')::real) AS "Outdoor °C", LEFT(instance_hash, 8) AS "metric" FROM metrics WHERE data->>'outdoor_temp' IS NOT NULL AND ('${instance:raw}' = '$__all' OR instance_hash IN (${instance:sqlstring})) AND $__timeFilter(time) GROUP BY 1, instance_hash ORDER BY 1;

SELECT time_bucket('1 hour', time) AS time, AVG((data->>'compressor_frequency')::real) AS "Frequency (Hz)" FROM metrics WHERE data->>'compressor_frequency' IS NOT NULL AND ('${instance:raw}' = '$__all' OR instance_hash IN (${instance:sqlstring})) AND $__timeFilter(time) GROUP BY 1, instance_hash ORDER BY 1;

SELECT time_bucket('1 hour', time) AS time, AVG((data->>'compressor_current')::real) AS "Current (A)" FROM metrics WHERE data->>'compressor_current' IS NOT NULL AND ('${instance:raw}' = '$__all' OR instance_hash IN (${instance:sqlstring})) AND $__timeFilter(time) GROUP BY 1, instance_hash ORDER BY 1;

SELECT time_bucket('1 hour', time) AS time, AVG((data->>'thermal_power')::real) AS "Thermal (kW)" FROM metrics WHERE data->>'thermal_power' IS NOT NULL AND (data->>'thermal_power')::real > 0 AND ('${instance:raw}' = '$__all' OR instance_hash IN (${instance:sqlstring})) AND $__timeFilter(time) GROUP BY 1, instance_hash ORDER BY 1;

SELECT time_bucket('1 hour', time) AS time, AVG((data->>'electrical_power')::real) AS "Electrical (kW)" FROM metrics WHERE data->>'electrical_power' IS NOT NULL AND (data->>'electrical_power')::real > 0 AND ('${instance:raw}' = '$__all' OR instance_hash IN (${instance:sqlstring})) AND $__timeFilter(time) GROUP BY 1, instance_hash ORDER BY 1;

SELECT time_bucket('1 hour', time) AS time, AVG((data->>'water_inlet_temp')::real) AS "Inlet", AVG((data->>'water_outlet_temp')::real) AS "Outlet", AVG((data->>'dhw_temp')::real) AS "DHW" FROM metrics WHERE ('${instance:raw}' = '$__all' OR instance_hash IN (${instance:sqlstring})) AND $__timeFilter(time) GROUP BY 1, instance_hash ORDER BY 1;

SELECT i.profile AS "Model", ROUND(AVG(a.cop_avg)::numeric, 2) AS "Avg COP" FROM metrics_daily_agg a JOIN installations i ON a.instance_hash = i.instance_hash WHERE a.bucket > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' AND a.cop_avg IS NOT NULL AND a.cop_avg > 0 GROUP BY i.profile ORDER BY "Avg COP" DESC;

SELECT a.bucket::date AS "Date", LEFT(a.instance_hash, 12) AS "Hash", i.profile AS "Model", ROUND(a.outdoor_temp_avg::numeric, 1) AS "Outdoor Avg °C", ROUND(a.cop_avg::numeric, 2) AS "COP Avg", a.compressor_on_samples AS "Comp. Samples", a.defrost_samples AS "Defrost Samples", ROUND(a.thermal_power_avg::numeric, 2) AS "Thermal Avg kW", ROUND(a.electrical_power_avg::numeric, 2) AS "Elec. Avg kW", a.total_samples AS "Total Samples" FROM metrics_daily_agg a LEFT JOIN installations i ON a.instance_hash = i.instance_hash WHERE a.bucket > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' ORDER BY a.bucket DESC, a.instance_hash;
